nasb.text: But in the morning, when the wine had gone out of Nabal, his wife told him these things, and his heart died within him so that he became as a stone.

esv.text: In the morning, when the wine had gone out of Nabal, his wife told him these things, and his heart died within him, and he became as a stone.

cnv.text: 到了早晨，拿八酒醒了，他的妻子才把這些事告訴他，他就嚇得魂不附體，立刻中風癱瘓了。

ccb.text: 次日清晨，拿八酒醒以后，他妻子把发生的一切告诉他，他吓得昏死过去，身体僵硬如石。
